title: scopulophila parryi
intro: Scopulophila parryi is a flowering plant species, also known as Parry's scopulophila, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Native American cultures, and has been found to have medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scopulophila parryi include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these benefits. In herbal preparations, Scopulophila parryi can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
